case_title: JACKSON DENISE VS CASEY STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY JACKSON DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY STEVE BELM DICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NO INFORMATION ABOUT SERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY STEVE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.00, DEF DID NOT FILE RELEASE OF LIABILITY. CAR SOLD 12/91. RELEASE NOT FILED UNTIL 6/92. DEF NOT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
